ValidationRule.description: Prevents editing of header fields that were copied from the source Quote when the Sales Order was created. System Administrators are exempt so they can correct data issues.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', OR( ISCHANGED(AccountId), ISCHANGED(BillToContactId), ISCHANGED(OpportunityId), ISCHANGED(Pricebook2Id), ISCHANGED(QuoteId), ISCHANGED(BillingStreet), ISCHANGED(BillingCity), ISCHANGED(BillingState), ISCHANGED(BillingPostalCode), ISCHANGED(BillingCountry), ISCHANGED(ShippingStreet), ISCHANGED(ShippingCity), ISCHANGED(ShippingState), ISCHANGED(ShippingPostalCode), ISCHANGED(ShippingCountry), ISCHANGED(Quote_Date__c), ISCHANGED(Shipping_Mode__c), ISCHANGED(Valid_Till__c), ISCHANGED(Vertical__c), ISCHANGED(Reason_for_Revision__c), ISCHANGED(Billing_Address__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Fields copied from the source Quote cannot be edited on the Sales Order. Contact your System Administrator if a correction is needed.
